scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:cli && npm run build:game && npm run build:scripts && npm run build:client && npm run build:studio
scripts.typecheck: npm run generate:components && npm --workspaces --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace @honknet/hui-runtime run build && npm --workspace @honknet/server run test && npm --workspace apps/client run test && npm --workspace tools/studio run test
scripts.build:sdk: npm --workspace @honknet/shared run build && npm --workspace @honknet/server run build && npm --workspace @honknet/client run build && npm --workspace @honknet/hui-runtime run build
scripts.build:game: npm --workspace @example-game/shared run build && npm --workspace @example-game/server run build && npm --workspace @example-game/client run build
scripts.generate: npm run copy:resources && npm run generate:components
scripts.verify:web: npm run validate && npm run typecheck && npm run build
